home.hero_desc: Centralized platform for incident management, IT assets, and IT support in public administrations.
home.features_desc: All tools needed to efficiently manage IT support in public administration.
home.feature_tickets_desc: Centralized incidents, automatic priorities, integrated SLA.
home.feature_assets_desc: Hardware and software inventory, scheduled maintenance.
home.feature_support_desc: Requests handled with assignment and real-time tracking.
home.feature_dashboard_desc: KPIs, trends and IT performance visualization.
home.feature_integration_desc: Connection with existing enterprise tools and directories.
home.step1_desc: Access your workspace using ministry credentials.
home.step2_desc: Report an incident in a few clicks and track its progress.
home.step3_desc: A technician handles your request based on priority.
home.step4_desc: Confirm resolution and view full history.
home.videos_desc: Role-based video tutorials to get started quickly.
home.doc_desc: Detailed guides, FAQs and procedures for each feature.
home.contact_desc: The ministry IT team is available to help you use the platform.
home.video_ticket_desc: Learn how to report an incident and track it.
home.video_treat_desc: Assignment, pending, resolution and internal notes.
home.video_admin_desc: Global supervision, manual assignment and user management.
home.video_assets_desc: Add, edit and track IT equipment.
home.video_kb_desc: Consult and contribute to shared documentation.
home.video_notif_desc: Configure SLA alerts and ticket notifications.
home.feature_chatbot_desc: Natural language chatbot, automatic ticket creation, knowledge base search — hosted on-premise.
home.feature_kb_desc: Technical articles, FAQs, internal procedures — accessible to all roles and searchable by the chatbot.
home.feature_notif_desc: Email alerts and system notifications for every ticket, SLA, or asset event.

messages.unassigned_ticket: Ticket #{{id}} "{{title}}" has not been assigned for more than 2 hours
messages.ticket_assigned: "{{title}}" has been assigned to you by {{actor}}
messages.sla_breached: Ticket "{{title}}" has exceeded its resolution deadline
messages.ticket_closed: Your ticket has been closed by {{actor}}
messages.user_mismatch: Asset "{{asset}}" is assigned to "{{assigned}}" but used by "{{detected}}" (IP: {{ip}})
messages.unknown_device: An unlisted device has been detected: {{hostname}} (IP: {{ip}}, MAC: {{mac}})
messages.never_seen: "{{asset}}" has never been detected on the network since its creation
messages.reappeared: "{{asset}}" has reappeared on the network after {{days}} day(s) of absence

anomalies.title: Anomaly Detection
anomalies.unknown_alert_desc: detected on the network, not listed in inventory.

ticket_detail.msg_auto_generated: 🤖 This ticket was automatically generated by the monitoring system.
ticket_detail.internal_checkbox: 🔒 Internal note (visible to technicians and admins only)

remote_session.active_desc: The technician started a {{tool}} session. Launch the tool on your computer and enter the ID below to authorize the connection.
remote_session.modal_desc: Launch your remote support tool, generate a session, then enter the ID or link here so the agent can join.
remote_session.start_success: Remote session started. The agent has been notified.

asset_detail.reliability_alert_text_end: in 6 months. Replacement or deep maintenance is recommended.
asset_detail.no_live_data: No live data available for this asset yet.
